name: Kintsugi
description: Midnight ceramic mended with gold — two lacquer seams meet at every break, creeping along new fractures after each redraw.

code.style: --seam1: @p(var(--color1), var(--color1), var(--color2)); --a1: @rand(360deg); --a2: @rand(360deg); --l1: @rand(34%, 72%); --l2: @rand(26%, 58%); --rule: ( /* both seams leave one emitted break point, so the crack reads as a single mend */ --kx: @r(20, 70); --ky: @r(20, 70); @random(${shapeFrequency}) { :before { content: ''; position: absolute; left: calc(@var(--kx) * 1%); top: calc(@var(--ky) * 1%); width: var(--l1); height: calc(17px / @Y); border-radius: 99px; background: var(--seam1); transform-origin: 0 50%; transform: rotate(var(--a1)); transition: ease 700ms; } :after { content: ''; position: absolute; left: calc(@var(--kx) * 1%); top: calc(@var(--ky) * 1%); width: var(--l2); height: calc(17px / @Y); border-radius: 99px; background: var(--color1); transform-origin: 0 50%; transform: rotate(var(--a2)); transition: ease 700ms; } } );
code.doodle: :doodle { @grid: ${grid}; @size: ${width} ${height}; overflow:hidden; text-align:center; box-sizing:border-box } :container { background: var(--color0); overflow:hidden; }
